LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE NOV-29-2021 HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF EMA BELL'S MOTION TO APPROVE PROPOSITION 65 SETTLEMENT AND CONSENT JUDGMENT, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PLAINTIFF'S UNOPPOSED MOTION TO PROPOSITION 65 SETTLEMENT AND CONSENT JUDGMENT IS GRANTED. COUNSEL FOR THE PLAINTIFF IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE AND SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH REPEATS VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE COURT'S RULING. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER, JR.; CLERK: SEAN KANE; COURT REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR NO. 8600, MARIA.TORREANO@GMAIL.COM (302/RBU)

Off Calendar Jan-27-2022 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-16-2021 Continued To Feb-16-22 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment
Off Calendar Nov-29-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF EMA BELL's Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment.

No appearances are made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Plaintiff's unopposed motion to Proposition 65 settlement and consent judgment is granted.

Counsel for the plaintiff is required to prepare and submit a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR No. 8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com (302/RBU)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-21-2021 Continued To Jan-05-22 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
